# @socketsecurity/lib

> Core utilities and infrastructure for Socket.dev security tools. 543 subpath exports, grouped by namespace.

Import any namespace by its subpath, e.g. `import { callAiHttpModel } from '@socketsecurity/lib/ai/http'`. Each link below points at the TypeScript declarations shipped in the package, where the full signature for that subpath lives.

## Top-level

- [@socketsecurity/lib/errors](./dist/errors/message.d.ts)
- [@socketsecurity/lib/http-request](./dist/http-request/node.d.ts)
- [@socketsecurity/lib/integrity](./dist/integrity.d.ts)
- [@socketsecurity/lib/logger](./dist/logger/node.d.ts)
- [@socketsecurity/lib/native-messaging](./dist/native-messaging/index.d.ts)

## abort/

- [@socketsecurity/lib/abort/signal](./dist/abort/signal.d.ts)
